Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Grave Hound]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — The Grave Hound is Omega.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 22''' — The Grave Hound is a figure that terrifies the Syndicates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Grave Hound is a code name used by Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 43''' — The Grave Hound went after The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 43''' — The Nuren man attempted to negotiate with the Grave Hound.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — Benri does not trust the Grave Hound.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — The Grave Hound is an entity that requires a leash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — The Grave Hound requested the destruction of Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 34''' — Omega is referred to as the Grave Hound.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
